title: Norwegian Grilled Salmon with Couscous
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring grilled Norwegian salmon served atop a bed of couscous with a hint of lemon and herbs.
instructions: Season salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Grill salmon for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
While salmon is cooking, heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add couscous to the skillet and stir to coat with oil.
Cook couscous for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Fluff couscous with a fork and stir in lemon juice.
To serve, place grilled salmon on top of couscous and garnish with parsley and dill.
